keySetup.title: Teelto kelɗe kaɓirgol maa
keySetup.description: Ɗum kaɓirgol woodaani have maa suturo kelal yet. jiggito gooto password-protected dannditol, walla generate gooto kesum keypair (gooto ma be able to jangu kesum ɓatakuuje from jooni on).

keySetup.enterPassword: Naatnu finnde konte maa ngam min mbaawa danndude kelɗe maa e kisal.

auth.headline: Ɓatakuuje kisnaaɗe ngam kala neɗɗo, kala nokku
auth.description: Gannugol hakkunde timmo e timmo, firo to 100+ ɗemngals, disappearing ɓatakuuje, e sawto/widewoo alaadduing.

feature.encryption: Gannugol hakkunde timmo e timmo by goowaaɗo

hero.line1: Ɓatakuuje kisnaaɗe ngam kala neɗɗo, kala nokku — wondude e
hero.sub: heɓ gooto a yoɓetaake kisnaaɗo telefon tonngoode to noddugol e text worldwide over Wi-Fi walla keɓe. Enjoy end-to-end gannugol, disappearing ɓatakuuje, e HD sawto/widewoo noddugol — e built-in kuutorɗe that ballal aɗa stay seŋiiɗo across borders.
hero.freeNote: Basic noddugol e texting are a yoɓetaake. Advanced AI e premium fannuuji require gooto ɓeydaalaa.

feat.encryption: Gannugol hakkunde timmo e timmo, always on
feat.translate: Break ɗemngal barriers in maa haalaaji

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum 6 characters. huutoro gooto strong, unique finnde.
registration.smsConsent: By creating gooto konte, aɗa agree to jaɓɓu SMS tintine related to maa Chatforia dillere (such gooto ɓatakuuje from other kuutoro’en). ɓatakuru & keɓe njoddiiji waawi huutora. aɗa waawi suɓo out at any time in teelte.

refund.title: Dawirgol ruttingol kaalisi
refund.intro: At Chatforia, min strive to provide gooto high-quality carwol to fow kuutoro’en. Ɗum ruttingol njoddi dawirgol outlines when ruttingol njoddi waawi be issued.

subscriptions.title: Binndanɗe
subscriptions.body: Binndanɗe are faktuura in advance on gooto recurring basis. aɗa waawi haaytu at any time through maa konte teelte walla ngal platform huutoraama to purchase.

eligibility.title: Laawol heɓde ruttingol njoddi
eligibility.body: ruttingol njoddi waawi be granted ngam duplicate charges, yoɓde juumre, walla technical caɗeele preventing naatgol to yoɓaaɗo fannuuji. fow ɗaɓɓitannde are reviewed case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Alaan-Refundable
nonRefundable.body: Min generally do alaat provide ruttingol njoddi ngam unused time, partial binndannde periods, walla failure to haaytu hade rekesumal.

thirdParty.title: Cooggol rewrude e pelle goɗɗe
thirdParty.body: So purchased through third-party platforms such gooto ngal Apple App Store, ruttingol njoddi ena waɗɗii be ɗaɓɓitaama directly through those platforms.

contact.title: Jokkondir
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Haalaforia LLC, 30 N Gould Street STE N, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

whyMessaging.title: Hol ko waɗi ɓatakuru Platforms Matter More Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: ɓatakuru platforms have become gooto of ngal most important kuutorɗe ngam communication in hannde world. Iwde e heeriingo haalaaji to business interactions, ɓatakuru jaaɓnirgal yamir yimɓe to stay seŋiiɗo instantly e efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: yimɓe rely on ɓatakuru jaaɓnirgal ngam daily communication e giɗɓe, galle, e colleagues. Whether it's gooto yaawi update walla gooto long haala, ɓatakuru provides gooto convenient e flexible way to stay in touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: gooto of ngal main advantages of ɓatakuru platforms is their yaawde. ɓatakuuje are yettaama instantly, yamir kuutoro’en to communicate in goonga time. Ɗum level of convenience has made ɓatakuru ngal cuɓoraaɗo method of communication ngam many yimɓe.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: ɓatakuru platforms connect yimɓe across ngal globe. e internet naatgol, kuutoro’en waawi communicate regardless of location, making it easier to build relationships e collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern ɓatakuru platforms focus on giving kuutoro’en tammbitagol over their keɓe e haalaaji. fannuuji like gannugol, suturo teelte, e ɓatakuru tammbitagol yamir kuutoro’en to communicate e confidence.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: ɓatakuru continues to evolve e kesum fannuuji such gooto AI-powered responses, firo, e multimedia sharing. gooto technology advances, ɓatakuru platforms ma become even more powerful e versatile.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia is built e these principles in mind, offering gooto fast, kisnaaɗo, e user-friendly ɓatakuru experience ngam gooto seŋiiɗo world.

global.title: Ko jokkondiral winndere ndee laatotoo yeeso
global.intro: Communication has evolved rapidly over ngal past few decades. Hol ko once ena waɗɗii telefon noddanɗe walla in-person meetings waawi jooni be done quickly through ɓatakuru platforms. gooto technology continues to advance, winndere communication is becoming faster, more accessible, e more inclusive.
global.barriersDesc: gooto of ngal biggest bayle in communication is ngal reduction of geographic barriers. yimɓe waawi jooni connect e others across ngal world in near goonga time. Whether ngam heeriingo haalaaji, business, walla collaboration, ɓatakuru platforms have made distance far less keerol.
global.translationDesc: ɗemngal has traditionally been gooto of ngal biggest obstacles to winndere communication. hannde, built-in firo kuutorɗe ballal bridge that gap. Platforms like Chatforia yamir kuutoro’en to communicate more easily even if they speak different ɗemɗe, creating kesum opportunities ngam seŋorde e understanding.
global.realtimeDesc: yaawde is gooto kelal factor shaping modern communication. kuutoro’en expect ɓatakuuje to be yettaama quickly, e modern infrastructure wallitordes that expectation. Real-time ɓatakuru hurmins more natural e fluid haalaaji.
global.privacyDesc: gooto communication becomes more digital, suturo e kisal are increasingly important. kuutoro’en want confidence that their haalaaji are protected. fannuuji like gannugol e user-controlled teelte ballal ballal gooto more kisnaaɗo communication experience.
global.futureDesc: ngal future of winndere communication ma likely waɗ more advanced kuutorɗe, such gooto AI-assisted ɓatakuru, improved firo, e enhanced kuutoro experiences. gooto technology evolves, communication ma continue to become more intuitive e accessible.
global.outro: Platforms like Chatforia are part of this shift, ballal yimɓe connect more easily across ɗemɗe e borders.

howItWorks.title: alaa Chatforia gollorta
howItWorks.intro: Haalaforia is designed to make communication simple, fast, e accessible. Getting fuɗɗoed takes just gooto few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: seŋo up huutoraade maa email walla innde kuutoro to sos maa Chatforia konte.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect e others by suɓoing jokkondire walla fuɗɗoing kesum haalas.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ɓatakuuje are yettaama quickly to provide gooto smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-in firo ballal kuutoro’en communicate across different ɗemngals.
howItWorks.step5Desc: toppito maa cuɓoraaɗe, jokkondire, e communication teelte.

safety.title: Kisal e ɗowirɗe renndo
safety.intro: Chatforia is committed to maintaining gooto safe e respectful environment ngam fow kuutoro’en. These jamirooje ballal ensure gooto positive experience ngam everyone.
safety.respectDesc: kuutoro’en are expected to communicate respectfully. mettinol, bonannde, walla harmful behavior is alaat permitted.

tools.block: Haɗ kuutoro'en ngam haɗde jokkondiral goɗngal

safety.enforcementDesc: min waawi take action against konte that violate these jamirooje, including warnings, restrictions, walla permanent removal from ngal platform.

profile.errQuietHours: deƴƴere waktuuji ena waɗɗii be between 0 e 23.
profile.ageBandHint: min tan store gooto age range (alaa maa exact ñalngu of birth). Ɗum is huutoraama to keep mbaydi sukkitiiɗo haala pairings reasonable.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: huutoro age-based nanndugol in mbaydi sukkitiiɗo Haala
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: Tuma on, min eto to pair aɗa e yimɓe in nanndotooɗo age ranges.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Who waawi aɗa be nanndugol e?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Teens are always nanndugol tan e other teens. Adults cannot be nanndugol e teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: ngam kisal, konte in ngal 13–17 age range waawi tan be nanndugol e other 13–17 konte in mbaydi sukkitiiɗo haala.
profile.foriaRemember: wattu Ria remember things aɗa tell it
profile.foriaRememberDesc: Tuma this is on, Foria waawi huutoro maa past mbaydi sukkitiiɗo haala haalaaji (just e aɗa) to keep ngal haala flowing. aɗa waawi turn this off any time.

profile.portHint: Want to keep maa woodngo tonngoode? aɗa waawi port it into Chatforia wireless.

upgrade.title: Ɓeydano

upgrade.subtitle.app: fuɗɗo e amen a yoɓetaake, ad-supported eɓɓo. Go ad-free e Plus, walla uddit full semmbe fannuuji e Premium.

mobile.title: Haalaforia cinndel (eSIM keɓe pakke)
mobile.subtitle: ɓeydu winndere keɓe to keep Haalaforia working even alaa Wi-Fi. njoddi automatialaadduy adjust tugniiɗo on maa leydi e currency.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pick gooto one-time winndere keɓe pakke so Chatforia keeps working when you’re traveling walla away from Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Min alaa jaay keɓe pakke les 3 GB.

features.throttle: yaawɗe waawi slow ɓaawo high usage

disclaimer.devices: eSIM keɓe pakke require gooto eSIM-compatible e uddittaaɗo kaɓirgol. woodugol waylotoo by telefon model, carriyer, e leydi. hebbinde e yaawɗe vary by region.

small.title: Fuɗɗoer pakke
small.desc: waɗ 3 GB of high-speed keɓe — ideal ngam light ɓatakuru e occasional alaaddirɗe.
small.bestFor: Short jahaaji, light ɓatakuru, e occasional alaaddirɗe

medium.title: Traveler pakke
medium.desc: waɗ 5 GB of high-speed keɓe ngam jahaaji, commuting, e regular VoIP alaaddirɗe.
medium.bestFor: Weekend jahaaji, regular VoIP alaaddirɗe, e kartal

large.title: Power pakke
large.desc: waɗ 10 GB of high-speed keɓe ngam tedduɗo haala, noddanɗe, e widewoo on ngal Chatforia laylaytol.
large.bestFor: tedduɗo haala, alaaddirɗe, widewoo, e hotspot huutoro
large.aria: Buy Power kuutoro eSIM keɓe pakke

compare.title: yerondir eSIM keɓe pakke
compare.disclaimer: Actual keɓe usage depends on how aɗa huutoro Chatforia (sawto, widewoo, mejaa, e other jaaɓnirgal on maa telefon).

family.title: Haalaforia Galle (lollinaaɗo keɓe)
family.subtitle: lollin gooto single keɓe lollinol across maa galle. gooto faktuura, multiple Haalaforia kontes, winndere hebbinde.

small.title: Galle tokoso
small.desc: waɗ 20 GB of lollinaaɗo high-speed keɓe — great ngam 2–3 light kuutoro’en.

medium.title: Galle hakkee
medium.desc: waɗ 40 GB of lollinaaɗo high-speed keɓe — ideal ngam 3–5 hurminaaɗo limɓe.

large.title: Galle mawɗo
large.desc: waɗ 80 GB of lollinaaɗo high-speed keɓe — ngam semmbe families that are always online.

feature.shared: lollinaaɗo keɓe lollinol ngam maa galle
feature.fairUse: Subject to fair-use dawirgol e nokkuure keerɗe

family.disclaimer: Family pakke sos walla ɓeydu up gooto lollinaaɗo keɓe lollinol. aɗa waawi noddu e momtu limɓe sahaa kala.
family.footnote: Family pakke lollin gooto single keɓe lollinol across jokkol Chatforia konte. woodugol e keerɗe depend on maa leydi e nokkuure regulations.

why.title: Hol ko waɗi yimɓe switch to Haalaforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives aɗa gooto goonga telefon tonngoode, ñeeñal firo, e gooto clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Haalaforia vs TextAlaaw
textnow.body: Lighter ɓatakuuje jaaynirde on Free, gooto simple Plus ɓeydaalaa when you’re ready, e Premium kuutorɗe TextNow woodaani offer.

voice.title: Haalaforia vs Google Sawto
voice.body: Modern jaaɓnirgal, global-first design, e built-in firo instead of kiiɗɗum-school alaaddu ɓenningol.

messengers.title: Haalaforia vs haala jaaɓnirgal
messengers.body: Text goonga telefon tonngooɗe — alaa just other jaaɓnirgal kuutoro’en — e AI e dartol built in. Great if you’re coming from jaaɓnirgal like TextFree walla TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Comparison tugniiɗo on peñculy woodi humpito e waawi waylu over time. Other gooto yoɓetaake-texting jaaɓnirgal like TextA yoɓetaake walla TextMe are generally similar to TextAlaaw.

free.q: Mbele ngal gooto yoɓetaake eɓɓo really gooto yoɓetaake?
free.a: eey. ngal Free eɓɓo waɗ gooto Chatforia tonngoode, noddugol, e ɓatakuru e ɓatakuuje jaaynirde. aɗa waawi stay on Free gooto long gooto aɗa like, walla ɓeydaalaa to momtu ɓatakuuje jaaynirde e uddit more fannuuji.

plusPremium.q: Hol ko ngal difference between Plus e Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus momtu ɓatakuuje jaaynirde e extends maa ɓatakuru aslol — perfect ngam everyday huutoro. Premium ɓeydu extra feewnungol, AI kuutorɗe ngam winnditagol e jaabawuuji, e ardungal ballal ngam tedduɗo kuutoro’en.

esim.q: Hol to do eSIM keɓe pakke work?
esim.a: Chatforia cinndel huutortoo winndere eSIM hebbinde. woodugol depends on maa leydi e kaɓirgol. gooto ma see ballal options tuma hurmingol inside ngal jaaɓnirgal.

cancel.q: Mbele miɗo waawi haaytu walla waylu eɓɓe sahaa kala?
cancel.a: eey. aɗa waawi toppito walla haaytu maa binndannde from ngal yoɓde page in ngal jaaɓnirgal. bayle take effect at ngal timmo of maa woodngo yoɓde period.

family.q: Hol alaa do Galle pakke work?
family.a: Family pakke sos gooto lollinaaɗo keɓe lollinol across multiple Chatforia konte. gooto neɗɗo pays ngal faktuura, e aɗa waawi noddu walla momtu limɓe e set keerɗe per neɗɗo.

gettingStarted.title: Fuɗɗorde
gettingStarted.subtitle: kesum to Chatforia? Ɗum yaawi fuɗɗo shows ngal haajuɗum so aɗa waawi be gollotooɗo in hojomaaji.

alert.text: Ɗum tinndinoowo ma ɓeydoo gooto min launch kesum fannuuji. So goɗɗum ŋakki, wattu min kalaaw via

section2.title: 2) Fuɗɗo ɓatakuru
section2.item1: sos gooto DM walla Group e neldu maa arannde ɓatakuru.
section2.item2: huutoro jaajol firo to haala across 100+ ɗemngals.
section2.item3: eto disappearing ɓatakuuje e jangu receipts in Porofil → Suturo.

section3.title: 3) Go ɓuri yeeso
section3.item1: aɗa waawi ɓeydaalaa to gooto yoɓaaɗo eɓɓo sahaa kala inside ngal jaaɓnirgal.
section3.item2: Once you’re seŋo in, aɗa waawi jokkol ɓeydaaɗo kaɓirɗi e set up gannaaɗo dannditte from teelte in ngal jaaɓnirgal.

account.q: Hol alaa do I sos walla ruttin my konte?
account.a: aawto ngal jaaɓnirgal walla huutoro geese, doɓɓu “sos konte”, ƴeewto maa email/telefon. to ruttin, huutoro “yejjitii finnde”.

privacy.q: Mbele ɓatakuuje gannaaɗe hakkunde timmo e timmo?
privacy.a: Eey. Ɓatakuuje e alaaddirɗe are gannaaɗe hakkunde timmo e timmo by goowaaɗo. Ko gooto e jaɓoowo tan mbaawi ɗi jangaade.

translate.q: Hol alaa does jaajol firo work?
translate.a: Hurmin “Firo e jaajol” in Teelte → Mbaydi e Ɗemngal. min firo e kaɓirgol so ena wallitaa, otherwise through API kisnaaɗe e metakeɓe famɗuɗo.

contact.a: Jokkondir e amen to support@chatforia.com. Ɓeydu nataliji yaynirde e yamre jaaɓnirgal maa.

contact.title: Jokkondir e amen
contact.successMsg: Thanks—amen gure ma jaabawol by email.
contact.errorSend: waawata alaa neldu. Please email support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Ɗum suturo dawirgol explains how Chatforia (“min”, “min”) roɓɓin, huutortoo, e lollin humpito when aɗa huutoro amen jaaɓnirgal e carwe. min design Chatforia to minimize ngal keɓe min waawi naatgol.

infoWeCollect.title: Humpito ngo mooɓaten
infoWeCollect.account: konte info (e.g., email/telefon) to sos e kisnaaɗo maa konte.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: gannaaɗo loowdi (ɓatakuuje/noddanɗe) is end-to-end gannaaɗo; min waawaa jangu it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagalaastic/usage like crash logs, kaɓirgol type, walla coarse ƴeewtagol keɓe to improve moƴƴugol.

sms.title: cinndel tonngoode telefons e SMS
sms.body: So aɗa choose to provide gooto cinndel telefon tonngoode, min huutoro it to hurmin fannuuji such gooto konte verification, seŋo tintine, e user-to-user ɓatakuru via SMS where ballal. min waawi neldu transactional SMS ɓatakuuje related to maa konte e dillere on Chatforia. aɗa waawi suɓo out of receiving SMS ɓatakuuje at any time by jaabawol e gooto ballal opt-out kelme jiytorde (such gooto “STOP”) walla by changing maa tintinol cuɓoraaɗe in ngal jaaɓnirgal. min do alaa jaay maa telefon tonngoode walla huutoro it ngam unrelated marketing.
sms.addRecipient: ɓeydu gooto jaɓɓotooɗo above to fuɗɗo…

howWeUse.title: Hol alaa kuutorteno humpito
howWeUse.provide: Provide e kisnaaɗo ngal carwol (auth, spam/bonannde yiytugol).

sharing.title: Lollingol
sharing.body: Min alaa jaay heeriingo keɓe. min waawi lollin keeriiɗo keɓe e gollotooɓe (e.g., push tintine, ƴeewtagol keɓe) les strict kontraaji.

rights.title: Hakkeeji maa
rights.body: Depending on maa region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), aɗa waawi ɗaɓɓitannde naatgol, peewtagol, momtagol, walla opt-out of certain processing. jokkondir: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Keɓe jogagol e kisal
retention.body: min retain tan hol ko needed to yahrin ngal carwol e huutora industry-standard kisal. E2E loowdi waawaa be decrypted by min.

children.title: Sukaaɓe
children.body: Haalaforia wonaa fewnanaaka to sukaaɓe les 13 (walla gooto ena waɗɗii by maa nokkuure laawol).

changes.title: Bayle
changes.body: Min ma postu kesɗitine here e revise ngal “Last updated” ñalngu.

contact.title: Jokkondir
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Haalaforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: By huutoraade Chatforia aɗa agree to these sarɗiiji. So aɗa do alaa agree, alaa huutoro ngal carwol.

accounts.title: Konteeji
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Provide laaɓɗo info e keep credentials kisnaaɗo.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Aɗa aɗa jogii sago ngam dillere on maa konte.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable huutoro
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Alaa laawol salii, abusive, walla infringing loowdi; alaa spam walla automated bonannde.

sms.title: Jokkondiral SMS
sms.body: So aɗa provide gooto cinndel telefon tonngoode, aɗa agree that Chatforia waawi neldu aɗa SMS ɓatakuuje related to maa konte e huutoro of ngal carwol, such gooto seŋo tintine, kisal tintine, e ɓatakuuje related to haalaaji aɗa initiate walla participate in. min do alaa huutoro SMS ngam ɓeydude jaayde walla marketing ɓatakuuje alaa maa laaɓaani yamiroore. goowaaɗo ɓatakuru e keɓe njoddiiji waawi huutora. aɗa waawi suɓo out of SMS ɓatakuuje at any time by jaabawol e gooto ballal opt-out kelme jiytorde (ngam example, “STOP”) walla by updating maa tintinol teelte in ngal jaaɓnirgal.

yourContent.title: Maa loowdi
yourContent.body: aɗa retain hakkeeji to maa loowdi. aɗa grant min necessary hakkeeji to yahrin ngal carwol (e.g., routing, storage, firo).

disclaimer.title: tinndinol e liability
disclaimer.body: carwol is rokkaaɗo “gooto is” alaa warranties. to ngal fullest extent permitted by laawol, Chatforia wonaa liable ngam indirect walla consequential damages.

changes.title: Bayle
changes.body: min waawi update these sarɗiiji; continued huutoro ɓaawo bayle means acceptance.

contact.title: Jokkondir
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Haalaforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Mbele Alaat jaay walla lollin My heeriingo humpito
doNotSell.body: Chatforia does alaa jaay heeriingo humpito. California residents waawi still neldu ɗaɓɓitannde les CPRA huutoraade ngal buton below.

cookies.title: Cookie Teelte
cookies.body: Chatforia huutortoo minimal cookies (e.g., session, kisal). min alaa huutoro third-party ɓatakuuje jaaynirde cookies. toppito cookies via maa browser’s teelte.

phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Alaa tonngoode assigned. Pick gooto by area kod to fuɗɗo texting.

startChatModal.title: Fuɗɗo gooto haala
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Type gooto innde, innde kuutoro, telefon, walla email…
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Yiylo by innde kuutoro walla telefon
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Type gooto innde kuutoro walla telefon e press Yiylo.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: telefon/email entries ma be woodi ɓaawo aɗa danndu them gooto jokkondir.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Woorii to fuɗɗo haala e suɓoed jaɓɓotooɓe.

sounds.freeNotice: Aɗa on Free — premium tones are shown but locked. ɓeydaalaa to uddit fow.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Ɗum fannu requires gooto Premium eɓɓo.

aiSettings.title: Teelte AI
aiSettings.controlIntro: tammbitagol firo, ñeeñal jaabawuuji, e ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Hollu binndol asli wondude e firo
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Neldu ngal last few received ɓatakuuje (sanitized) to AI to suggest yaawi jaabawuuji.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Suuɗ konngi bonɗi e wasiyaaji AI
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: So on, suggestions returned by AI ma have flagged words masked

accessibilitySettings.title: Ɓeydude keɓgol e tintine
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options to make Haalaforia easier to huutoro alaa relying on sawto.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Fuɗɗos at alaarmal size. Increase if aɗa prefer larger text in accessibility teelte.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual tintine ngam ɓatakuuje & noddanɗe
Show banners e tiitoonde blink so aɗa alaa miss dillere.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate on kesum ɓatakuuje (when wallitordeed)
Trigger kaɓirgol vibration e tintine.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash screen on garooɗo alaaddu
Brief bright flash when gooto alaaddu rings.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: ɓeydu gooto binndol sawto to ojoo ɓatakuuje aɗa jaɓɓu.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlerts: Visual tintine ngam ɓatakuuje e alaaddirɗe
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Show banners e tiitoonde blink so aɗa alaa miss dillere.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Brief bright flash when gooto alaaddu rings.

privacySection.strictE2EE: Strict gannugol hakkunde timmo e timmo
privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: Store tan ciphertext on ngal server. Dartins AI/Translate e moderation yiytino.

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Yiylo by alias, innde, innde kuutoro, walla telefon
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: gooto few fast ways to heɓ rolling.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: lollin maa noddu jokkol to fuɗɗo haalating instantly.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Stay in touch on ngal go e Chatforia ngam iOS e Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: maa ɓatakuuje stay synced across geese e cinndel.

randomChat.title: Haala kewiiɗo
randomChat.description: 'Meet neɗɗo kesum instantly'. 'Min ma nanndugol aɗa e uddit gooto temporary haala suudu.' 'Haala aalaanymously arannde. ɓeydu Sehil goɗngol if it feels right.'
randomChat.saveGuard: tan human-to-human haalas waawi be danndud
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: min tan store gooto age range (alaa maa exact ñalngu of birth). Ɗum is huutoraama to keep mbaydi sukkitiiɗo haala pairings reasonable. to nanndugol e yimɓe (alaa just RiaBot), set maa age band in teelte → Age & mbaydi sukkitiiɗo haala.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: Set maa age range in profil → Age & mbaydi sukkitiiɗo haala to be nanndugol e yimɓe.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: to nanndugol e yimɓe (alaa just RiaBot), set maa age band in teelte → Age & mbaydi sukkitiiɗo haala.
randomChat.subtitle: Meet neɗɗo kesum instantly, walla suɓo to haala e Ria.
randomChat.setAge: Set maa age range in profil → Age & mbaydi sukkitiiɗo haala to be nanndugol e yimɓe.

ria.intro: Hey there 👋 I’m Ria. Hol ko on maa mind?

greetings.long1: Hey {{name}} 👋 I’m here. Hol ko on maa mind?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 Hol ko would aɗa like to talk about hannde?
greetings.long3: Hey {{name}}! I’m fow ears — hol ko up?
greetings.long4: Nice to see aɗa, {{name}} 👋 Hol ko on maa mind hannde?
greetings.long5: Hey {{name}} 🙂 Want to vent, ask, walla just haala?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}! I’ve got time — what would aɗa like to talk about?
greetings.short1: Hey {{name}}, I’m still here. Hol ko up?
greetings.short2: Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Anything else aɗa wanted to ɓeydu?
greetings.short3: Back kadi, {{name}}? 😊 Tell me hol ko on maa mind.
greetings.short4: Hey {{name}} ✨ Ready to pick up where min left off?
greetings.short6: Oh hey {{name}}! Got goɗɗum kesum on maa mind?

login.title: Continue to Haalaforia

forgot.title: yejjitii Finnde
forgot.helper: Enter ngal email aɗa huutoraama to sos maa Chatforia konte e we'll neldu aɗa gooto kisnaaɗo jokkol to fuɗɗito maa finnde.
forgot.emailInvalid: Tiiɗno enter gooto valid ñiiɓirde iimeel.
forgot.genericError: Horiima process ɗaɓɓitannde. Please eto kadi in gooto moment.
forgot.sentHelper: So gooto konte exists e that email, we've neldaama gooto finnde fuɗɗito jokkol. It waawi take gooto few hojomaaji to arrive. Be sure to check maa spam walla promotions folder.

login.ssoUnavailable: Single-sign-on is woodngoly woodaani. huutoro innde kuutoro e finnde instead.

error.unprocessable: Invalid ɗaɓɓitannde. Check maa innde kuutoro/email e finnde.
error.deviceLimit: kaɓirgol keerol reached ngam ngal Free eɓɓo. Log out on goɗɗo kaɓirgol walla ɓeydaalaa to Premium to jokkol more kaɓirɗi.
error.premiumRequired: Ɗum action requires gooto Premium eɓɓo.

dialer.title: Noddirɗe

support.genericError: goɗɗum went wrong. Please eto kadi.
support.resolvedInstantly: caɗeele resolved instantly — alaa ticket needed.

privacy.q: Mbele ɓatakuuje gannaaɗe hakkunde timmo e timmo?
privacy.a: Eey. Ɓatakuuje e alaaddirɗe are gannaaɗe hakkunde timmo e timmo by goowaaɗo. Ko gooto e jaɓoowo tan mbaawi ɗi jangaade.

translate.q: Hol alaa does jaajol firo work?
translate.a: Hurmin “Firo e jaajol” in Teelte → Mbaydi e Ɗemngal. min firo e kaɓirgol so ena wallitaa, otherwise through API kisnaaɗe e metakeɓe famɗuɗo.

contact.a: Jokkondir e amen to support@chatforia.com. Ɓeydu nataliji yaynirde e yamre jaaɓnirgal maa.

encryptionRecovery.title: toppito gannugol
encryptionRecovery.description: Back up, ruttin, uddit, walla fuɗɗito maa gannugol kelal.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Ɗum browser cannot currently decrypt maa gannaaɗo ɓatakuuje. ruttin, uddit, walla fuɗɗito maa kelal to continue.

unlockPasscode.label: uddit passcode (woodngo kaɓirgol)
unlockPasscode.description: huutoraama to decrypt maa kelɗe locally hade jollin

backupPassword.label: dannditol finnde
backupPassword.description: huutoraama to encrypt ngal dannditol fiilde

restoreBackupPassword.label: dannditol finnde
restoreBackupPassword.description: ngal finnde aɗa sosaama when backing up maa kelal on iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: Kesum nokkuure passcode
newLocalPasscode.description: Protect kelɗe at rest on this browser

resetLocalPasscode.label: Kesum nokkuure passcode
resetLocalPasscode.description: ena waɗɗii hade resetting so ngal kesum kelal is protected on this kaɓirgol

errors.restoreIncomplete: kelal ruttin incomplete walla incorrect ngam this konte
errors.noBackup: Alaa dannditol gannaaɗo woodi e konte ngal
errors.noServerPublicKey: Ɗum konte does alaat woodngoly expose gooto server peñcu kelal
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Server dannditol does alaat nanndugol ngal woodngo konte gannugol kelal
errors.resetIncomplete: gannugol fuɗɗito did alaat complete correctly

confirm.reset:
fuɗɗito gannugol ngam this konte?

Older gannaaɗo ɓatakuuje waawi become unreadable unless aɗa ruttin ngal original kelal goɗngol.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Ɗum generates gooto kesum gannugol kelal ngam maa konte. Older gannaaɗo ɓatakuuje waawi become unreadable unless aɗa ruttin ngal original kelal goɗngol.

press.title: Jaŋtorde
press.contactLine: ngam mejaa inquiries, reach min at
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia is gooto privacy-first ɓatakuru jaaɓnirgal that makes cross-language haala effortless. ɓatakuuje are end-to-end gannaaɗo by goowaaɗo, e built-in firo ballal 100+ ɗemɗe in goonga time. kuutoro’en waawi hurmin disappearing ɓatakuuje, keep jangu receipts cuɓorannde, e sync across kaɓirɗi. woodi on iOS, Android, e ngal geese.
press.assetsSubtitle: Logos, nate yaynirde, e product natalry.
press.scanTip: E ordinateer? Skannaa e cinndel maa ngam heɓde jaaɓnirgal ngal.

careers.title: Golle
careers.intro: We’re gooto tokoso founding gure building Chatforia — gooto suturo, winndere messenger launching on geese, iOS, e Android. So aɗa care about suturo, gannugol, e delightful kuutoro experiences, we’d love to hear from aɗa.
careers.openRoles: Uddit founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Alaade.js), Frontend/geese Engineer (React), cinndel Engineer (iOS), cinndel Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Kisal & gannugol Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Hol no to huutora: huutoro ngal buton below to email maa resume e jokkol.
careers.whyBullets:
• Ballal build ngal foundation of gooto kesum winndere messenger.
• Ship improvements huutoraama across geese, iOS, e Android.
• Work directly e ngal founder on architecture e product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of ngal stack: ɓatakuru, sawto, widewoo, gannugol, telecom, AI.
• Join at ngal beginning — hade ngal kuutoro base scales.

about.title: Baɗte Haalaforia
about.description: Chatforia is gooto kisnaaɗo, multilingual messenger e end-to-end gannugol, jaajol firo, e sawto/widewoo noddugol. amen mission is simple: ballal yimɓe connect—safely, privately, e across ɗemɗe.

values.access: naatgol ngam fow: Firo e jaajol 100+ ɗemngals.
values.control: tammbitagol: Disappearing ɓatakuuje e jangu receipts are cuɓorannde.

about.howDescription: ɓatakuuje are gannaaɗo on maa kaɓirgol hade they yal it. firo, dannditte, e kaɓirgol sync are designed to minimize what amen servers waawi see.

advertise.title: Advertise e Haalaforia
advertise.description: Reach engaged ɓatakuru kuutoro’en e tasteful, brand-safe placements. min offer banner inventory in high-visibility spots, sponsorships, e house promos. Premium subscribers do alaa see ɓatakuuje jaaynirde.

adsense.withPubIdShort: min also serve inventory via Google AdSense. aɗa waawi target Chatforia e publisher ID {{pubId}}, walla huutoro ngal form below ngam direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: min also serve some inventory via Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships are woodi—huutoro ngal form below.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: We’re finalizing amen ɓatakuru jaaynirde inventory. Tell min about maa campaign e min ma recommend placements.

why.highSession: High session frequency e dwell time in haala UI
why.brandSafe: Formatiji brand kisnaaɗi; doggol ɗuuɗal waɗiraa e jam
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsored moments (e.g., “Fuɗɗo gooto Haala” modal) woodi
why.deals: Direct deals walla programmatic via AdSense/Google ɓatakuuje jaaynirde

randomChat.title: Haala kewiiɗo
randomChat.subtitle: Meet neɗɗo kesum instantly, walla suɓo to haala e Ria.
randomChat.description: Haala aalaanymously arannde. ɓeydu Sehil goɗngol if it feels right.
randomChat.setAge: Set maa age range in profil → Age & mbaydi sukkitiiɗo haala to be nanndugol e yimɓe.
randomChat.waitingAddFriend: nana sabbii ngam them to accept ɓeydu Sehil…
randomChat.hiddenUsernames: innde kuutoro stay cuuɗiiɗo haa both yimɓe suɓo ɓeydu Sehil.
randomChat.riaSeparate: haala e Ria sahaa kala — separate from mbaydi sukkitiiɗo human nanndugol.
